js.home: const cate=env.get("category");const page=env.get("page");let url;if(cate=="/"){url=env.baseUrl;}else{url=`${env.baseUrl}/index.php/vod/type/id/${cate}/page/${page}.html`;}const res=await env.fetch(url);const html=await res.text();const $=env.parseHTML(html);return $(".videoContent li").toArray().map(item=>{const a=$(item).find(".videoName");const id=a.attr("href")??"";const title=a.text().trim();const cover="";const remark=$(item).find(".time").text().trim();return{id,title,cover,remark};});
js.detail: const id=env.get("movieId");const url=`${env.baseUrl}${id}`;const res=await env.fetch(url);const html=await res.text();const $=env.parseHTML(html);const desc="暂无简介";const playlist=[{title:"播放源",videos:[{id:id,text:"播放"}]}];return{desc,playlist};
js.search: const wd=env.get("keyword");const page=env.get("page");const url=`${env.baseUrl}/index.php/vod/search/page/${page}/wd/${wd}.html`;const res=await env.fetch(url);const html=await res.text();const $=env.parseHTML(html);return $(".videoContent li").toArray().map(item=>{const a=$(item).find(".videoName");return{id:a.attr("href"),title:a.text().trim(),cover:""};});
